message:
fix(core): replace truncating epoch_ms casts in session_restore and export

Continue systematic replacement of `d.as_millis() as i64` with safe
`i64::try_from(d.as_millis()).ok().unwrap_or(0)` in session_restore.rs
and export.rs production code paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
